The '''power lash''', also known as the '''energy lash''' or '''force whip''', was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] weapon used by the keepers of [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]]. It was used in a whip-like manner and had variable charge settings. The tip was sizzling [[Color/Legends|green]] and would cause extreme pain across the skin of its victims. One notable victim was [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] when he was captured and put to slave labor by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]] aboard the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Gorgon]]'' in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].
